properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 82/23
 1. FROM JUNE 29 2023.M/V RAMFORM HYPERION IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY
  OPERATIONS AND TOWING 14 STREAMERS AT 6NM LENGTH AND A WIDTH OF 1 NM.
 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 7 NM ASTERN AND 3NM ABEAM.
 SURVEY VESSEL STANDING BY ON VHF CH 72 AND 16.
 GUARD VESSEL THOR OMEGA AND AAS PROVIDER IN ATTENDANCE.
  
 IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 A.71-22 N    019-10 E
 B.69-20 N    011-00 E
 C.67-23 N    004-37 E
  UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 54/23
